title: Canadian Noodle Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful gluten-free noodle dish made with Canadian ingredients.
instructions: Cook the Canadian noodles according to the package instructions.
In a pan, heat the xtra virgin olive oil over medium heat.
Add the cooked fish and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the gluten-free soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the chopped cilantro and stir to combine.
Combine the cooked noodles and fish mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
